tasks.description: The Canvas renderer draws only the necessary visible work while preserving cross-viewport edge correctness.
steps: Manual /spike-b synthetic 10k+ scroll shows no blank flashes or missing crossing edges

tasks.description: The graph canvas, hit testing, and FPS overlay stay aligned with renderer geometry while preserving smooth-scroll behavior.
steps: Manual /spike-b validation confirms click/hover/right-click targeting still matches rendered commits
FPS overlay reports visible rows and frame-time metrics during synthetic large-history scrolling

patterns: Viewport range + edge culling: getVisibleRange() and segmentIntersectsVisibleRows()
